flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Columbia State Community College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (18.6% → 13.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia State Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Columbia State Community College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.6k → $8.5k).
